final:
module xnor_gate (
    input wire a,
    input wire b,
    output wire y
);
    assign y = ~(a ^ b);
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      y <= ~a & ~b; // This statement does not affect the output of the XNOR gate
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: y <= ~a & ~b; // This statement does not affect the output of the XNOR gate
